title: polygala capillaris
intro: Polygala capillaris, also known as Taegiso in traditional Korean medicine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala capillaris are said to include improving the immune system, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing antioxidant protection against free radicals. In herbal preparations, Polygala capillaris is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, and extracts to support overall health and well-being.
